body:
## What's Changed
* fix(issues): fix sort order and grouping for issues list by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/40


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.1.4...v0.1.5

## What's Changed
* fix(deps): update AWS SDK Go v2 dependencies to patch versions by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/39


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.1.3...v0.1.4

## What's Changed
* feat(ai): add customizable issue copy prompts for workspace and teams by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/35
* feat(issues): add issue subscription system for change notifications by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/36
* Alberto/kua 49 addbulk assign to cycle by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/37
* feat(selfhosting): add forced upgrade mechanism with upgrade page by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/38


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.1.2...v0.1.3

## What's Changed
* Alberto/kua 46 fixmark as blocking blocked by need to be aligned by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/32
* Alberto/kua 44 improveperformance issue list is growing slow by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/33
* fix(ui): conditionally show save view button and improve load more by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/34


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.1.1...v0.1.2

## What's Changed
* feat(ai-settings): implement custom AI settings and profile management by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/31


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.1.0...v0.1.1

## What's Changed
* Add sub-issue hierarchy UX and GitHub activity refinements by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/28
* refactor(issues): extract label chips into reusable component by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/29
* Add customizable sidebar views and team-scoped saved views by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/30


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.0.10...v0.0.11

## What's Changed
* Alberto/kua 30 improvementtoast make toasts to look way nicer by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/26
* fix(release-notice): use dvh units to prevent modal overflow by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/27


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.0.9...v0.0.10

## What's Changed
* Alberto/kua 27 addsearch global search of issues should also sear by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/20
* Alberto/kua 37 fixprompt copy images are not included in the prom by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/21
* feat(workspace): add default labels on workspace creation by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/22
* fix(views): remove filter preview from save dialog and view list by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/23
* feat(issues): add default prefill for issue creation dialog by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/24
* feat(websocket): dispatch real-time updates for GitHub events by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/25


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.0.8...v0.0.9

## What's Changed
* feat(teams): add issue sorting within workflow by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/19


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.0.7...v0.0.8

## What's Changed
* Alberto/kua 12 fixux general UI data refreshing by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/14
* feat(release): add multi-release changelog with markdown rendering by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/15
* feat(ui): add keyboard shortcuts help button to sidebar by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/16
* fix(preferences): prevent stale remote from overwriting local theme c… by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/17
* feat(workspace): add workspace delete and owner-based settings manage… by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/18


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.0.6...v0.0.7

## What's Changed
* fix(views): redirect to inbox instead of workspace root on view errors by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/9
* Alberto/kua 5 adddemo global demo mode with info for login by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/10
* fix(issues): show only last 3 activity entries by default by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/11
* Alberto/kua 22 fixissues creation with create more after creation by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/12
* feat(preferences): add workflow sort customization with per-team over… by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/13


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.0.5...v0.0.6

## What's Changed
* fix(issues): randomize label color on creation by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/4
* Alberto/kua 10 addpassword eye toggle on password input by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/5
* fix(issues): support special characters in issue titles by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/6
* feat(teams): add delete and leave team functionality by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/7
* feat(login): add logo to login page by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/8


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.0.4...v0.0.5

## What's Changed
* KUA-1: fix mobile layout by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/2
* feat(issues): add label creation and bulk label assignment by @carbogninalberto in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/3

## New Contributors
* @carbogninalberto made their first contribution in https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/pull/2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbogninalberto/kuayle/compare/v0.0.3...v0.0.4
